title: helleborus viridis subsp. istriacus
intro: Helleborus viridis subsp. istriacus, also known as the Istrian Christmas rose, is a subspecies of the green hellebore plant, belonging to the Helleborus genus. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects, making it useful for treating wounds, fever, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Helleborus viridis subsp. istriacus include its potential to reduce inflammation, fight off infections, and provide relief from cold and flu symptoms, as well as its ability to support the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant may include infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, which can be used internally or applied topically to the affected areas.
